prestazioni: Replace the original 3.7L Tadek Marek 'VB6E' inline-6 with a fully balanced and blueprinted version featuring forged Mahle pistons (87.5mm bore, 10.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth for a displacement increase to 4.2L (92mm bore x 102mm stroke).

Install a custom-built dry-sump lubrication system by Aviaid with a 10-quart capacity, dual scavenge pumps, and a remote oil cooler (Setrab 19-row) to prevent oil starvation during sustained high-G cornering.

Fit a bespoke Weber 48 IDA carburetion system with velocity stacks, custom jetting (185 main, 170 air correctors), and a Mallory Unilite distributor with a Pertronix ignition module for optimized fuel delivery and timing (38° total advance at 3,500 RPM).
estetica: Replace the original aluminum body panels with lightweight carbon fiber replicas from RML Group, including a one-piece front clip, doors, and rear fenders, reducing weight by 45 kg while retaining the original DB4 GT silhouette.

Install a period-correct but upgraded braking system featuring 12.5-inch vented discs with four-piston calipers from AP Racing (CP5200 series) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with braided stainless steel brake lines and a Tilton master cylinder for improved pedal feel.

Fit a custom Borrani wire wheel conversion (16x6 front, 16x7 rear) with knock-off hubs, shod in Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (205/55 R16 front, 225/50 R16 rear) for enhanced grip and a vintage aesthetic.
